items.placeName: Cua 350 – Crab Noodle Soup Phu Quoc

facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 119 reviews. One dish on the menu that matters.

Cua 350 at 38 Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is where locals go for crab noodle soup done right. Bowl arrives loaded. Broth is rich, crabmeat is real, price won't hurt.

Most tourists eat at the resort. The ones who find this place talk about it for weeks.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the crab go in. That broth color tells you everything. Cua 350 on Đ. 30 Tháng 4, 4.9 stars and 119 people aren't exaggerating. This bowl is the move.

instagram.caption:
4.9 stars. 119 reviews. One crab noodle soup that earns every single one.

Cua 350, Đ. 30 Tháng 4. Go hungry.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Crab noodle soup so good it has a 4.9 on 119 reviews. Cua 350 is the bowl Phu Quoc locals keep ordering.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars. 119 reviews. This crab noodle soup at Cua 350 is the real deal. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamFood #FoodTok #TravelTips

POV: you finally find a Vietnamese restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo that locals actually rate.

thì là is sitting at 4.7 stars across 765 reviews. That number doesn't lie.

Traditional Vietnamese food done right, no tourist markup, no gimmicks. Just solid cooking on one of Phu Quoc's busiest streets.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa

facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa sits right on the beach, bungalows steps from the water, open-air restaurants where the breeze does the work. 4.8 stars across 961 reviews. Not luck. Consistency. Two restaurants, a full spa, beachfront villas. Phu Quoc at its quietest and most restorative. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Beachfront bungalow doors open straight to the sand. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa, 4.8 stars, 961 reviews. Dinner at an open-air restaurant with the ocean right there. This is what recovery looks like. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption: This place fixes burnout. Beachfront bungalows, spa, open-air dinners. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa, 4.8★, 961 reviews. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Bungalow. Beach. Spa. 4.8 stars. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa delivers every time. Tag your travel buddy.

tiktok.caption: Burnout cure found. Beachfront bungalows + spa + 4.8★ #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

items.placeName: Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa sits on a private beach on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, and it delivers exactly what that sounds like. Outdoor pools. A beach bar. A restaurant that doesn't ask you to leave. 4.6 stars across 1,390 reviews backs it up. Book a few nights and actually slow down. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Private beach. Beach bar. Outdoor pool. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is 4.6 stars for a reason. Tag your travel buddy who needs this.

instagram.caption: This place fixes burnout. Private beach, outdoor pools, beach bar. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa, 4.6★ across 1,390 reviews. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Pool. Private beach. Beach bar. Cassia Cottage delivers. 4.6★, 1,390 reviews. Tag who you're bringing.

tiktok.caption: Private beach + beach bar + outdoor pool. Cassia Cottage Resort is 4.6★ for a reason. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

Close-up: cold drink lands on beach bar counter

Guest walks from pool directly to beach

facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 4,963 reviews. And somehow Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc still flies under the radar.

Beachfront access at Ong Lang. Two restaurants, a full spa, and a pool that actually has space. Not the overdeveloped south coast crowds. Quieter side of the island, serious resort quality.

This is the Phu Quoc upgrade most visitors don't book in time. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Pool. Spa. Private beach stretch at Ong Lang. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc earns every one of its 4,963 reviews, and the quieter north shore makes it hit differently. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption:
4,963 reviews. 4.7 stars. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc delivers.

Beachfront, spa, 2 restaurants. Ong Lang side, so no south-coast chaos. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: Beachfront pool at Ong Lang. This is what 4.7 stars actually looks like at Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc.

tiktok.caption: 4,963 reviews and somehow still not overrun. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc, Ong Lang beach side. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel

facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this bakery. Locals on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 don't want you to find it. THU HIỀN BAKERY sits quietly in Khu 1 with a 4.6-star rating and 81 reviews from people who live here, not people on resort packages. Fresh baked goods, local prices, zero tourist markup. This is the real Phu Quoc morning routine. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what locals grab from THU HIỀN BAKERY before the tourists wake up. Khu 1, Phú Quốc. 4.6 stars. This is breakfast done right.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about THU HIỀN BAKERY. 4.6 stars, 81 real reviews, zero tourist markup. Your Phu Quoc morning sorted. Save this.

tiktok.caption: Locals only bakery in Phú Quốc. 4.6 stars, 81 reviews. THU HIỀN BAKERY is your real breakfast stop. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this bakery. Locals on Hùng Vương know better. Lan Chi Bakery is the kind of spot that fills up before most resorts serve breakfast. No English menu board. No tourist markup. Just fresh baked goods and a line that tells you everything. Find it at 8E-8F Hùng Vương, Phú Quốc. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fresh out the oven, 8E-8F Hùng Vương. Lan Chi Bakery gets busy fast. This is what the locals on Hùng Vương grab before work. No frills, no resort prices, just the real thing. Tag your travel buddy.

items.placeName: AM PM - Specialty Coffee and Wine bar

facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and spot a coffee bar that does specialty brews AND wine. Same place. Same menu. AM PM delivers both, and the 4.8-star rating from 160 reviews backs it up. Morning cold brew or evening glass, this spot works either way. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Specialty coffee at sunrise. Wine by sunset. AM PM on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo pulls off both, and 160 reviewers gave it 4.8 stars. Watch this one.

instagram.caption: POV: one café. Morning espresso. Evening wine. AM PM rated 4.8★ across 160 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Coffee bar to wine bar without moving seats. AM PM on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.8 stars. Go.

items.placeName: Into The Blue - Phu Quoc Snorkeling Boat Trip

facebook.caption:
530 reviews. Every single one gives it 5 stars.

Into The Blue on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the snorkeling boat trip that keeps showing up in every Phu Quoc itinerary for a reason. Crystal water, coral, and a crew that actually knows where the fish are.

No price data on hand, but 530 five-star ratings say book it before it sells out.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Jumping off a boat into Phu Quoc's clearest water. Into The Blue has a perfect 5.0 from 530 reviews. Book this one early.

instagram.caption:
530 reviews. Perfect 5.0. Into The Blue delivers.

Best snorkeling boat trip in Phu Quoc, full stop. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Boat drops anchor. Mask on. Go. Into The Blue, Phu Quoc. 5.0 stars, 530 reviews.

tiktok.caption: 530 reviews. Perfect 5.0. Into The Blue might be Phu Quoc's best kept boat trip. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocSnorkeling #VietnamTravel

facebook.caption: 1,490 reviews. Every single one a 5-star. That's not luck, that's Onbird Phu Quoc. This tour agency in Cửa Lấp runs boat trips, snorkeling, and island-hopping that locals actually rate. No inflated packages. No herding tourists onto crowded decks. Just a crew that shows up and delivers. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
Tourists book the big boat companies. Locals point you to Alley 91 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

Kimie's Tours runs snorkeling, diving, and hiking trips out of Phú Quốc with a 5.0-star rating across 260 reviews. That's a perfect score. Not rounded up.

Small operation. Real guides. The kind of trip you actually talk about after.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
